title: Generator
promptPlaceholder: Describe your application. For example: 'An app to manage office IT devices with condition, serial number...'
promptMissing: Prompt missing. Describe the app first.
centerSubtitle: Describe your desired app in natural language. Business OS generates the data model, UI, and app structure automatically.
installedEmpty: No custom apps installed yet. Once an app is created through the generator it appears here for reopening or upgrading.
promptsEmpty: Let CTOX draft a new app specification via the chat bar — prompts and suggestions appear here as templates for the generator on the left.
